name: In Ice Cold Blood
overview: Shocking true stories involving sex, money, murder – or a fatal cocktail of all three. Told through in-depth interviews, reenactments and archival footage, each hour-long episode delves into an edgy mystery filled with expert detective work, unexpected turns and stunning revelations.

trailers.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Official Series Trailer -  Premiering Sunday April 1 at 7/6c | Oxygen
